sacks_per_game_z.limits: Scheme-dependent. Some DTs eat blocks so others get sacks.

qb_hits_per_game_z.what: QB hits per game — pressures beyond sacks

pressure_rate_z.what: Total pressures (sacks + QB hits) per game

tfl_per_game_z.what: Tackles for loss per game — backfield penetration

solo_tackle_rate_z.what: Solo tackles as % of total tackles
solo_tackle_rate_z.limits: Can be low for DTs who occupy blocks for others.

tackles_per_snap_z.what: Tackles per defensive snap — involvement rate
tackles_per_snap_z.limits: High rates can mean the defense gives up yards (more tackle chances).

forced_fumbles_per_game_z.limits: Very rare event. One or two plays dominate career rates.

passes_defended_per_game_z.what: Passes defended per game — batting balls at the LOS
passes_defended_per_game_z.limits: Low frequency. Some DTs coached to get hands up, others aren't.
